title: Clone Netflix
description: The user is requesting a project to clone the Netflix platform.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Clone Netflix (DEM-2026-0067)

Executive Summary
This request proposes cloning the Netflix platform, a high-risk endeavor due to immense complexity and resource requirements. A thorough feasibility study is imperative to assess viability.

Direct Business Value/Impact
Direct value is low given lack of differentiation against an established market leader. It risks significant financial and operational investment without clear competitive advantage or ROI.

Potential Risk Mitigation
Conduct a comprehensive feasibility study and competitive analysis first. Explore unique niche markets or distinct content strategies, or pivot to a more achievable and differentiated offering.
capacity_reasoning: High-risk demand requires Senior Architect oversight.
Delivery team has 72% overall available capacity.
All required technical skills are available in the current workforce pool.
